text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, on the day of the URA award ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is where the map says. Hmm... It does have a
certain sense of formality about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out the award ceremony is in a different
venue this year, where even the entrance has a
very solemn air.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh, guess it was worth coming early. Look over
there, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We can see them with our own eyes... The alpha
predators.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen and Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is known by all to be the
greatest stayer. She successfully won the spring
Tenno Sho where the best long-distance racer is
decided.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Mihono Bourbon, who forged
her physique and stamina into a fine-tuned
machine. She has also been Umamusume of the
Year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And over there, there's Oguri Cap and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap emerged from regional races and
swept the nationals. It's safe to say that her
popularity and strength together make her a top
racer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it appears some of the invitees are here in
recognition for previous efforts, not only for
prizes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sis...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I spied the star of the day so I thought I
would come and say hello.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The dress code this year is signature racewear,
apparently chosen in honor of you. They are
clothes for a racer, after all, which means—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's enough. I don't want to get a big head.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why are you talking about big heads?! My head
isn't big!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I wasn't talking about you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...In any case, let's hurry inside.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Have you prepared a speech for when you accept
your award?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Speech?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Tell me you aren't serious!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.
choice_data_list:
As long as you answer their questions honestly,
you'll be just fine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Does she really, though?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
And without further ado, please welcome the
Umamusume of the Year, Narita Brian! Please
come to the stage!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is so hot right now! If she keeps this
up, do you think she'll surpass Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I want to skip straight to the finals! I wonder
which of them is stronger?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your award, Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
U-Um... So who would you most like to convey
your feelings to about receiving this award?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, that'd have to be...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Every single racer here today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've only just finished my classic year. Senior races
are coming next.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That means even if you call me Umamusume of
the Year, I still haven't raced everyone that's here
today. Can you really call that impressive?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so. It's just a temporary title. You
could strip me of the award and title right now,
and I wouldn't care.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So I'm asking every Umamusume here today—how
about a battle for the top?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's find out which of us really is the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's all.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
W-Wait a moment, please! We're still planning
to—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not me. All I'm planning on is the race.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: ...What just happened?! Did she just challenge everyone to a race?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
F-forget about surpassing Rudolf! This is
something totally unprecedented!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, contact the editorial department! The front
page of tomorrow's paper will be "Brian's
Unprecedented Challenge!"

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
"Calling the Emperor and all other racers: Who
will be the one to defeat Narita Brian?"

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Your announcement caused quite the stir, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After much searching, I finally find Narita Brian
standing outside the venue.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're the one who told me to be honest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I want to compete more. I want to win. It's as
simple as that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm not sure if she has any idea what to
expect from here, Narita Brian nevertheless smiles
fearlessly.
